metadata.title: Terms of Use - Crimson Desert Trainer
metadata.description: Terms and conditions for using CrimsonDesertTrainer.com. By accessing or using this website, you agree to these terms.

page.title: Terms of Use
page.description: Welcome to CrimsonDesertTrainer.com. By accessing or using this website, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

intro.title: Terms of Use
intro.description: Welcome to CrimsonDesertTrainer.com. By accessing or using this website, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

website-purpose.title: 1. Website Purpose
website-purpose.description: This website provides informational content related to Crimson Desert trainers, cheats, guides, and external resources. We do not host or distribute executable files directly.

external-links.title: 2. External Links
external-links.description: Our website may contain links to third-party websites for downloading trainers or related tools. These external sites are not controlled by us, and we are not responsible for their content, security, or practices.

no-warranty.title: 3. No Warranty
no-warranty.description: All content is provided for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee that any trainer or tool will work with your system or game version.

user-responsibility.title: 4. User Responsibility
user-responsibility.description: You are responsible for how you use the information and tools referenced on this site. We recommend using trainers only in offline or single-player environments.

intellectual-property.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectual-property.description: All trademarks, game names, and logos belong to their respective owners. This site is not affiliated with the official developers of Crimson Desert.

limitation-of-liability.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
limitation-of-liability.description: We are not liable for any damages, data loss, or issues arising from the use of third-party tools or downloads.

changes-to-terms.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes-to-terms.description: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the website means you accept the updated terms.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions, please contact us at: touch@crimsondeserttrainer.com
